hints.Obmutesce only: There are two imperatives: 'Obmutesce' (be silent) and 'exi' (go out)
hints.exi only: 'exi' is an imperative, but so is 'Obmutesce' — both are commands
hints.ab and eo: 'ab' is a preposition and 'eo' is a pronoun here, not verbs

steps.target: to be silent / to be mute
choices: to be silent / to be mute

hints.to change: 'to change' is 'mutare' — 'Obmutesce' comes from 'obmutescere' (to become silent)
hints.to die: 'to die' is 'mori' — 'Obmutesce' comes from 'obmutescere' (to become mute)

hints.present indicative: Present indicative would be 'obmutescit' — 'Obmutesce' is a command
hints.subjunctive: Subjunctive would be 'obmutescat' — 'Obmutesce' is the imperative
hints.infinitive: Infinitive would be 'obmutescere' — 'Obmutesce' is the imperative singular

hints.muto, mutare, mutavi, mutatum: These are principal parts of 'muto' (to change)
hints.obicio, obicere, obieci, obiectum: These are principal parts of 'obicio' (to throw before/object)
hints.morior, mori, mortuus sum, —: These are principal parts of 'morior' (to die)

hints.to exist: 'to exist' is 'existere' — 'exi' comes from 'exire' (to go out)
hints.to demand: 'to demand' is 'exigere' — 'exi' comes from 'exire' (to go out)
hints.to be: 'to be' is 'esse' — 'exi' comes from 'exire' (to go out)

hints.present indicative: Present indicative would be 'exit' — 'exi' is an imperative command
hints.perfect indicative: Perfect indicative would be 'exiit' — 'exi' is the imperative
hints.subjunctive: Subjunctive would be 'exeat' — 'exi' is a direct command

hints.eo, ire, ivi, itum: These are principal parts of 'eo' (to go) — 'exeo' adds the prefix 'ex-'
hints.exigo, exigere, exegi, exactum: These are principal parts of 'exigo' (to demand/drive out)
hints.exsisto, exsistere, exstiti, —: These are principal parts of 'exsisto' (to come forth/exist)

translation: Be silent and come out of him
